surface_verification.justification: Single-field cold-repo projection change (expected_dimensions) + fixture re-refresh; no web/UI surface. E2E = the -m empirical gate (7 real-OSS fixtures, offline replay + live --refresh) + live grade.py of 5 repos + monorepo. Cold grades now cap at B; dogfood monorepo re-graded A 100 (authoritative, reconciliation measured 1.0).

behaviors.behavior: cold projection declares change_reconciliation as the one expected-but-dark control
cold heuristic grade caps at B (89, not A) with a factual verdict
behaviors.evidence: test_projector_fixtures.py::test_heuristic_grade_caps_at_b_not_a PASSED (grade B, score 89.0, verdict cites reconciliation)

behaviors.behavior: CLI terminal/markdown/json/URL output shows B for a cold well-run repo
cap is heuristic-only — authoritative grade unaffected (monorepo stays A)
behaviors.evidence: test_authoritative.py::test_authoritative_grade_never_runs_the_projection PASSED + live monorepo A 100 authoritative (reconciliation measured 1.0)

behaviors.behavior: empirical fixtures reflect the B-cap; gate green (well-run C..B > deprecated F)
behaviors.evidence: -m empirical (test_real_repo_grade_in_band, test_calibration_ordering) PASSED; express/agent-skills B, superpowers B, flask C, request F
